title: stellaria longipes var. altocaulis
intro: Stellaria longipes var. altocaulis, also known as high-altitude starwort, is a variety of flowering plant that belongs to the carnation family (Caryophyllaceae). It is a perennial plant native to high-altitude mountainous regions, known for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional Chinese medicine. The plant is used to treat a variety of health issues, including fever, rheumatism, and respiratory problems, due to its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. High-altitude starwort can be prepared as a tea or tincture, and is also used in salves and ointments to aid in the healing of wounds and skin irritations.
